substep.title: Write Final Findings JSON
substep.action: After user-waiver handling, write the final findings (with user_waived markers and updated verdict) to {{bundle_dir}}/findings-{{gate_id}}.json. This is the file render-verification-report.py consumes.

check.action: Surface stderr verbatim. The renderer's schema validation is strict; failures usually indicate the validator emitted malformed JSON (a validator bug — surface for fix, do not paper over).
